# Oleg Izosimov — Art Director & Design Group Lead
> Portfolio website of Oleg Izosimov, a senior art director and design group lead specializing in brand systems, rebranding, digital campaigns, and creative direction.

## About
Oleg Izosimov is a Russian art director and head of design group with 7+ years of experience in brand design, rebranding, and creative direction. He has led major projects for M.Video-Eldorado (Russia's largest electronics retailer), Libertex/Forex Club (international fintech), and FC Zenit (Russian Premier League football club). His work spans brand identity systems, digital campaigns, merchandise design, and integrated marketing campaigns.

## Key Projects
- **M.Video-Eldorado Brandbook (2023-2024)**: First rebrand in 30 years for Russia's largest electronics retailer. Developed a unified visual system for two brands within one ecosystem.
- **M.Video App Icons (2025)**: Updated brand colors and refined logo variant for mobile applications.
- **M.Video Skupidon Campaign (2025)**: Federal Valentine's Day campaign featuring Prokhor Shalyapin. Key visual and pose variations.
- **M.Video POPOLAM Campaign (2025)**: First federal brand campaign with AI-generated mascot and OLV video created using neural networks.
- **M.Video Merch (2023)**: Merchandise concept and design worn by influencers Wylsacom and Ruzil Minnekaev.
- **Libertex / Forex Club (2021-2023)**: Creative direction for the Forex Club group of companies. Brandbook, 3D illustrations, advertising campaigns including Epic Dog Brawl, Beat the Bank, and Tame Inflation.
- **FC Zenit — This Is All You (2022)**: Stop-motion music video from 20,000 photographs for Zenit FC x Karan Singh lifestyle collection. Published on RBC.

## Expertise
- Brand systems & visual identity
- Art direction & creative direction
- Rebranding & brand strategy
- Digital campaigns & advertising
- Merchandise & product design
- Integrated marketing campaigns
- AI-assisted design & neural network campaigns
